findings.summary: Agent config UI: ComposerAgentControl exists in prompt-input.tsx, agents loaded via SDK (sdk.app.agents()) through tanstack query, NO agent settings tab in dialog-settings.tsx yet, i18n keys exist in all locales

Context display: SessionContextUsage + SessionContextTab already provide full context metrics UI with ProgressCircle and tooltip. No overflow/pressure awareness. Backend compaction events not consumed by renderer.

Settings architecture: vertical sidebar tabs (Kobalte), 4 tabs (General/Shortcuts/Providers/Models), 25+ config rows in General with no search, two search patterns exist (fuzzysort in Keybinds, useFilteredList in Models)
No Electron IPC channels exist for agent or context data - all flows through sidecar HTTP server (REST API + SSE stream)
